# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest major release of the Fluksos CLI is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0.0 | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Fluksos, please **do not** open a public issue. 
Instead, report the issue privately through GitHub Security Advisories by navigating to the "Security" tab of this repository and clicking "Report a vulnerability".

All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.
